about_description: An informational toolkit designed to assist legal and non-legal professionals in identifying, investigating, addressing and seeking accountability for the deliberate use of mass starvation as a tool against civilians.
contact_description: Content will be provided later. This page will contain contact information and ways to reach support.
copyright_description: Content will be provided later. This page will contain copyright information and legal notices.
disclaimer_description: Content will be provided later. This page will contain disclaimer information and legal statements.
userguide_description: Content will be provided later. This page will contain user guide and instructions on how to use the application.
try_different_keywords: Try different keywords or check spelling
remove_bookmark_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this bookmark?
save_articles_instruction: Save articles from the Library to access them here
article_saved_message: This article has been added to your saved items.
bookmark_error: There was an error saving this article. Please try again.

templates.title: All Templates and Checklists
templates.subtitle: recommended investigation forms
templates.downloadMessage: Templates need to be downloaded before use. This will download all templates to your device.
templates.downloadHint: This may take a few moments...
templates.downloadFailed: This template could not be downloaded or is not available.
templates.tryAlternativeMethod: The file cannot be opened directly. Would you like to copy the link?
templates.fileNotAvailable: Template file is not available locally

landing.description: For the safety and security of our users, the content of this app must be manually downloaded and updated. You are seeing this message because the app currently has no content downloaded. Please go to settings and download the most recent version of the app's content.
landing.skipMessage: You can download content later from Settings. Some features may not be available without content.
landing.infoNote: This ensures you always have the latest and most secure content.

settingsScreen.downloadMessage: To use all app features, you need to download the latest content. This includes articles, templates, and other resources.
settingsScreen.downloadSuccessMessage: Content has been successfully downloaded. The app is now ready to use!
settingsScreen.downloadError: Failed to download content. Please check your internet connection and try again.
